## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, blockers, and team transition.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Team Transition:** Vivek Shankar becomes the primary POC for Prophecy, with Ehtisham Hussain shifting to a content-only role.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [**Critical Blocker:** GrowthX needs GA4 & GSC access to build Looker dashboards for performance tracking, a key deliverable for Prophecy leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Production Acceleration:** Cody will publish articles immediately to bypass internal review delays, editing live copy if needed to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Holiday Push:** The team is front-loading content production to build a buffer before the late-December holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

## Topics

### Team Transition

  - [Vivek Shankar is transitioning to the primary POC role for Prophecy over the next two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Ehtisham Hussain will move to a content-only production role.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Vivek will lead all future strategy and analytics discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

### Production & Process

  - [**Content Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [3 articles are in "Ready to Publish" (staging blocked by heavy Webflow traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [11 articles are in "For Review."](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Cody will publish articles immediately to bypass internal review delays.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Rationale → This ensures a consistent publication cadence and prevents content from stalling.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Cody will edit live copy post-publication if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Holiday Buffer:**](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [The team is accelerating production to build a content buffer before the late-December holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [Ehtisham is ideating new topics, including a series on "data transformation."](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

### Blockers & Resolutions

  - [**Blocker: GA4 & GSC Access**](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [**Impact:** Prevents GrowthX from building Looker dashboards for performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [**Status:** Prophecy IT has not yet granted access, despite escalation from Will. Cody is also blocked from viewing data.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Resolution: `/guides` Page Live**](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [The `/guides` page is now live, unblocking the publication of guide-format articles.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ehtisham:**](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Stage the 3 "Ready to Publish" articles in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Continue ideating new topics to build the holiday content buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [Follow up with Prophecy IT on granting GA4 & GSC access to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [Continue reviewing and commenting on articles in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
      - [Reschedule next week's sync for Tuesday, Thursday, or Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/kzc1gfto-Vk753uEmAs3ySET2jfoxCVT?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
